quote: I'd used AI casually for a year and never felt confident in it. AI.M gave me a real framework — now I use it daily for client research and I actually trust my own judgment about when to double-check it.
name: Priya M.

quote: My AI Tutor helped me build personalized lesson plans in a fraction of the time it used to take. My students noticed the difference before I even mentioned I'd changed anything.
name: David R.

quote: I automated three of our most repetitive intake workflows in my first month. The Socratic approach meant I actually understood what I was building, not just copying steps.
name: Anita K.
